round397ServerKvProgressCumulative.summary: Cloudflare KV is accepted as the server cumulative progress layer; D1/R2 full production claims remain blocked until FM_PROGRESS_DB or FM_PROGRESS_R2 is visible.

round408ReleaseGatePublicConsistency.summary: Round408 locks release authority to the current source/public version and requires real-account read-only no-drift plus strict durable write/teacher primary-store proof before full server claims.

round412ServerProgressStableMonitoring.summary: Round412 blocks stale local cumulative readers, tightens heartbeat acceptance, and verifies stable server snapshot identity across real-account reads.

round413ProgressInvariantKey.summary: Round413 locks cumulativeStableKey and stable/volatile field separation across student progress, stats, teacher summary, real-account read-only proof, and browser login cycles.

round414ProgressSnapshot181103VideoRelea.summary: Round414 locks empty snapshot and production blocker visibility across student progress, stats, teacher summary, 181103 entry/resource gates, and private-video management results.

round415ProgressDurableMonitor181103Rele.summary: Round415 prevents login/localStorage/recent-window drift in student and teacher cumulative progress surfaces.

round416ProgressRealAccountProofHardenin.summary: Round416 proves read-only no-drift with real accounts and exposes write_quota_exceeded rather than hiding it behind network fallback.

round417ProgressPrimaryStoreQuotaHardeni.summary: Round417 hardens cumulative progress against login/deploy drift while reducing KV fallback writes; full durable writes still require primary D1/R2 binding and strict real-account proof.
